dependencies: Dependence on producers, gathering systems, refineries and pipelines owned and operated by others to supply assets
Reliance on third-party natural gas processing plants connected to NGL gathering systems
Dependence on crude oil production and connections with gathering systems, refineries and pipelines owned by third parties
risks: Closures, interruptions or reduced activity levels at third-party facilities may adversely affect business
Outages at refineries or reduced throughput on gathering systems or pipelines due to weather-related or other natural causes
Reduced operating pressures or other causes could reduce shipments
Closure of refineries that supply or are supplied by facilities could reduce volumes transported
Competition for supply with other midstream companies and major integrated oil companies

regulatory_risks: FERC regulation of interstate natural gas pipelines under Natural Gas Act
FERC regulation of interstate NGL, Refined Products and crude oil pipelines under Interstate Commerce Act
State regulatory authority regulation of intrastate movements
PHMSA safety regulations including pipeline asset integrity-management regulations
Pipeline Safety Improvement Act of 2002 requirements for high-consequence areas
Pipeline Safety, Regulatory Certainty and Job Creation Act of 2011 increased penalties
DOT and PHMSA regulation under Hazardous Liquid Pipeline Safety Act
U.S. Coast Guard regulations for marine terminals
Railroad Commission of Texas jurisdiction over field injection and withdrawal wells
Louisiana Department of Natural Resources regulations for underground natural gas storage caverns
Federal Clean Air Act emissions controls and permitting mandates
Federal Water Pollution Control Act requirements for discharge permits
Oil Pollution Act of 1990 requirements
EPA Mandatory Greenhouse Gas Reporting Rule
EPA final rule targeting oil and gas section emissions of greenhouse gases and VOCs
Renewable Fuel Standard (RFS) requirements and Renewable Volume Obligation
EPA fuels compliance regulations including fuel parameters standards
Inflation Reduction Act of 2022 Waste Emissions Charges or Methane Fees
CERCLA and RCRA requirements for hazardous substances cleanup and waste disposal
Endangered Species Act obligations for threatened and endangered species protection
TSA pipeline security directives and guidelines
Rate regulation challenges by shippers or changes in jurisdictional characterization by regulatory agencies
FERC indexing methodology reviews and potential rate reductions
State regulatory authority rate regulation for intrastate pipelines
Potential loss of market-based rate authority
Changes to federal, state and local taxation
New government regulations that could discourage customers from storing commodities

sanction_risks: Potential impact from geopolitical events including wars such as Russian invasion of Ukraine
Activities of OPEC and other non-OPEC oil producing countries impacting supply and demand
Instability in the Middle East affecting commodity prices
